narrative:
Beavercreek 024 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,050 registered voters, with 46.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.7 percentage points.
